arg.name: description_package
arg.description: Description package with robot URDF/xacro files. Usually not set, it enables use of a custom description.

arg.name: description_file
arg.description: URDF/XACRO description file with the robot.

arg.name: use_mock_hardware
arg.description: Whether to use mock hardware or real hardware.

arg.name: robot_1_ip
arg.description: IP address of the left robot.

arg.name: robot_1_scheduling_policy
arg.description: Async hw interface scheduling policy for left robot

arg.name: robot_2_ip
arg.description: IP address of the right robot.

arg.name: robot_2_scheduling_policy
arg.description: Async hw interface scheduling policy for right robot

let.name: robot_description
let.value: $(command '$(find-exec xacro) $(find-pkg-share $(var description_package))/urdf/$(var description_file).urdf.xacro \ use_mock_hardware:=$(var use_mock_hardware) \ robot_1_ip:=$(var robot_1_ip) \ robot_1_scheduling_policy:=$(var robot_1_scheduling_policy) \ robot_2_ip:=$(var robot_2_ip) \ robot_2_scheduling_policy:=$(var robot_2_scheduling_policy)')
